name: Lamb Balls and Eggs
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the lamb with your choice of seasonings, such as salt, pepper, cardamon, thai chili paste, and soy sauce, until smooth.
2. Evenly spread the mixture around an entire hard boiled egg.
3. Deep fry the lamb balls until they are dark brown.
4. Serve hot with a seasoned tomato sauce.
Note: This recipe is high in cholesterol but tastes delicious, especially when using cheap supermarket lamb at $1.50 per pound.
